nasb.text: The elders of the daughter of Zion Sit on the ground, they are silent. They have thrown dust on their heads; They have girded themselves with sackcloth. The virgins of Jerusalem Have bowed their heads to the ground.

esv.text: The elders of the daughter of Zion sit on the ground in silence; they have thrown dust on their heads and put on sackcloth; the young women of Jerusalem have bowed their heads to the ground.

cnv.text: 錫安居民的長老都坐在地上，默默無聲； 他們把塵灰撒在頭上，腰束麻布。 耶路撒冷的處女都垂頭至地。

ccb.text: 锡安城的长老腰束麻布， 头蒙灰尘，坐在地上， 默然不语； 耶路撒冷的少女垂头至地。
